reviewMethod: second direct review of exact ordered frames, OCR, ASR and class definitions after mismatch clustering; model outputs were not adopted as labels

overrides.reason: OCR alleges two teens in a stolen Hyundai and the frames show a police chase, so the stolen-vehicle allegation remains unsupported. No occupant is visible clearly enough to identify a minor; because the only age evidence is the unsupported overlay, minor involvement is unknown rather than present.

The upper comparison contains authentic Robert Downey Jr. footage. The AI-labelled lower comparison depicts a different generic man rather than a recognizable synthetic likeness of that public actor. Synthetic media is visible, but synthetic depiction of a recognizable public figure is not.
